title: SafeKeepingAssessmentTypeValues
description: Confirms that the process for releasing assets (single, dual, owner authorization, or agreement-based) is correctly followed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Valuation Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Confirms the current market value of the asset (e.g., securities, cash, or physical assets).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Valuation
x-enumeration-literals.description: If the asset is pledged as collateral, discounts may be applied to account for risk or volatility.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Liquidity Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Determines how easily the asset can be converted into cash if needed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures the asset is allowed under the custodial agreement (type, quality, rating, or regulatory compliance).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Confirms that holding, transfer, and release of the asset follow applicable laws, regulations, or internal policies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Legal Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verifies that the custodian has legal right or title to hold the asset.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Documentation Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Confirms that all necessary agreements, release instructions, and authorizations are properly recorded.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Protection Level Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Evaluates the adequacy of physical or electronic security measures (e.g., restricted access, segregated custody, high-security storage).
